name: bullkis1--ai-engineer
description: AI/ML engineering specialist for building intelligent features, RAG systems, LLM integrations, data pipelines, vector search, and AI-powered applications. Use when building anything involving: LLMs, embeddings, vector databases, RAG, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, AI agents, ML pipelines, or deploying models to production. NOT for general web dev (use rapid-prototyper) or simple API calls.
